theme_and_archetype.description: Authority, clarity, and function-first. A blend of Bloomberg-esque institutional seriousness and modern, frictionless EdTech. Focus on high contrast to prevent eye strain during long QCM sessions.
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Sober, trustworthy, corporate finance, but highly modern and distinct from 'AI slop' gradients.

typography.description: High-contrast pairing. The heading font delivers a strong, editorial, financial report feel. The body font is purely technical, clean, and optimized for dense text reading (crucial for QCMs).

fonts.usage: Use for all headings. Never center by default. Use tracking-tight.
Use for body copy, QCM questions, and answers.

hierarchy_rules.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-black text-slate-900
hierarchy_rules.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-bold text-slate-900
hierarchy_rules.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-bold text-slate-800

rules.gradients: BANNED. Use flat colors only. NO purple/white gradients. NO teal.
rules.ctas: Primary CTAs use brand_primary (#002FA7) with white text. Hover states should darken slightly.
rules.background_sections: Use Stark White for reading areas (QCM). Use #0A0A0A for the Footer or 'Impact' sections, keeping text stark white for extreme contrast.

grid_system.marketing: MODE A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric. gap-8 to gap-12. Large typography offsets. Never center-everything.
grid_system.dashboard: MODE B: The Control Room Grid. gap-4. Dense, actionable. Every pixel utilized. Built for performance.

spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Generous on marketing (py-24, py-32). Tight on Dashboard (p-6, gap-4). Container inner padding must be present on bordered cards.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or rounded-sm (max 4px). Sharp, institutional, no playful rounded corners.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strictly Left-Aligned. Optical alignment over geometrical.

surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Use pure white backgrounds with 1px solid border (#E4E4E7). On hover, translate-y-[-2px] with a sharp shadow (shadow-sm) and change border to #002FA7.
surface_strategies.headers: Solid background. border-b border-zinc-200. No transparent floating headers. Maintain high contrast.
surface_strategies.inputs: Shadcn defaults but override border-radius to rounded-none. Focus states must use a 2px solid ring of #002FA7.

qcm_card.default: border border-zinc-200 bg-white p-6 cursor-pointer hover:border-[#002FA7] transition-colors relative

components.progress_bar: Flat height (h-2), rounded-none, using brand_primary (#002FA7) for progress against a zinc-200 track.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-[#002480] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-300 text-zinc-900 rounded-none px-6 py-3 font-bold hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors

images.description: High contrast black and white architectural shot for the landing page hero background. Apply a light white/gray overlay (bg-white/80) so text is highly readable.
images.usage_instructions: Use as a background element with high opacity overlay or side-by-side in a bento grid.

images.description: Professional at laptop, for 'How it works' or 'Dashboard preview' sections.
Vibrant blue skyscraper reflection. Use for 'Why choose us' section to break up the monochrome.

icons.style: stroke-width: 1.5, absolute geometric feel. Avoid playful/rounded icons.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. No floaty easing. Use transition-all duration-150 ease-out.
motion_and_interactions.qcm_feedback: Immediate color change (green/red) on validation. Add subtle shake for incorrect.

testing_attributes.rule: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Use pure Tailwind and raw HTML tags for marketing sections (landing page). Use pure asymmetry, heavy padding, and large font weights.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: For the dashboard/QCM platform, switch to Shadcn UI components but override border radii to `rounded-none` or `rounded-sm`. Ensure extreme data density and clarity.
instructions_to_main_agent.3: The QCM engine must be robust: 120 questions for the mock exam mode. Include a timer and calculate the 80% passing threshold.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: Do NOT use AI/generative gradients, blob shapes, or purple/teal colors. Stick to the Klein Blue (#002FA7) and Stark White/Zinc.
